title: UX Research Toolkit — Stories Layer
description: Layer schema extending each phase with agile user story data. Captures user stories in standard format, acceptance criteria, MoSCoW priority, release assignment, and effort estimates for product backlog mapping.

user_story.description: The user story in standard format: 'As a [user], I want [goal], so that [benefit]'.
examples: As a pet owner, I want to log Rocky's daily symptoms, so that I can share accurate health data with my vet

acceptance_criteria.description: List of conditions that must be true for this user story to be considered done. Each item is a testable, verifiable statement.
examples: El usuario puede registrar al menos 3 síntomas por día
El historial muestra los últimos 30 días
La app envía recordatorio diario a la hora configurada

priority.description: MoSCoW priority classification. 'must-have' = critical for launch; 'should-have' = important but not critical; 'could-have' = nice to have; 'wont-have' = explicitly out of scope for this release.

release.description: Which release, sprint, or iteration this user story belongs to.

effort_estimate.description: T-shirt size effort estimate for this user story. XS = trivial (<1 day); S = small (1-2 days); M = medium (3-5 days); L = large (1-2 weeks); XL = extra large (>2 weeks).
